comments.body:
Hello Assi,

Good Day!

For your first query, the app packs the products based on the product weight and dimensions (if available) in to one of the packages enabled in. the Packaging Settings.

If based on the configured weights (either the Box Max weight or total weight of the products as configured in Shopify), the app canoot pack all the items in to a single package, then it will split the order into 2 packages.

Please refer to Box Packing Method and how it works here - https://www.pluginhive.com/knowledge-base/pack-products-optimally-and-save-shipping-costs-with-shopify-fedex-app/#box-packing

Regarding the rates on checkout, when Saturday Delivery option is enabled in the app (Settings > Account Settings > Saturday Delivery), Saturday Delivery rates will be shown on checkout for the applicable services.

To check the cases further, could you please share the following details -
- Screenshot of the complete transaction from the checkout of your store in which the products added in cart and the address provided are clearly visible along with the rates returned by the app. We will replicate the same transaction from our end and check the case further.
- Correct One Rate available for Overnight services available on your FedEx account on fedex.com by using the exact same transaction details (ship from, ship to address, package weight and FedEx box). This will help us in verify the rates returned from the app for your cases.


Awaiting your response.

Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Assi,
 
Good Day!
 
For your first query, the app packs the products based on the product weight and dimensions (if available) in to one of the packages enabled in. the Packaging Settings.
 
If based on the configured weights (either the Box Max weight or total weight of the products as configured in Shopify), the app canoot pack all the items in to a single package, then it will split the order into 2 packages.
 
Please refer to Box Packing Method and how it works here - https://www.pluginhive.com/knowledge-base/pack-products-optimally-and-save-shipping-costs-with-shopify-fedex-app/#box-packing
 
Regarding the rates on checkout, when Saturday Delivery option is enabled in the app (Settings > Account Settings > Saturday Delivery), Saturday Delivery rates will be shown on checkout for the applicable services.
 
To check the cases further, could you please share the following details - 
  • Screenshot of the complete transaction from the checkout of your store in which the products added in cart and the address provided are clearly visible along with the rates returned by the app. We will replicate the same transaction from our end and check the case further.
  • Correct One Rate available for Overnight services available on your FedEx account on fedex.com by using the exact same transaction details (ship from, ship to address, package weight and FedEx box). This will help us in verify the rates returned from the app for your cases.
 
Awaiting your response.
 
Thanks and Regards,
Touseef
Team PluginHive

You're asking me a lot of stuff that I feel is not needed. Can we make a zoom call and I'll share the screen. As mentioned we are using the 2 PH apps simultaneously at checkout so we can show the one rate and also accounts rate. And I know the system will choose what it's cheaper. But when it comes to the priority Saturday delivery the system always choose the one rate and it shows the customer a very high rate.

Also is it possible to speak with the same agent who was setting up my shipping settings?

comments.body:
Hello Assi,

We have adjusted the default dimensions to allow more items to be packed into a single package. Going forward, you should not face problems with items being packed into multiple packages unnecessarily.

Regarding the **FedEx Priority Overnight Saturday Delivery (without One Rate)** service not showing, please allow us some time to check this from our end. We will get back to you with an update.

We appreciate your time and patience.

Thanks and Regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Assi,
 
We have adjusted the default dimensions to allow more items to be packed into a single package. Going forward, you should not face problems with items being packed into multiple packages unnecessarily.
 
Regarding the FedEx Priority Overnight Saturday Delivery (without One Rate) service not showing, please allow us some time to check this from our end. We will get back to you with an update. 
 
We appreciate your time and patience.

Thanks and Regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive

comments.body:
Need assistance from L3 team:

**Case:** FedEx Saturday Delivery as an individual service (similar to the FedEx app) is missing in MCSL.

**Details:**
The customer using the FedEx app installed MCSL to use One Rate along with account rates. Their goal is to compare rates between One Rate and account rates and use the cheapest option.

Currently, **FedEx 2Day** and **FedEx Priority Overnight** are working as expected.

However, **FedEx Priority Overnight Saturday Delivery** service is missing. The customer wants to offer both:
- FedEx Priority Overnight (weekday delivery)
- FedEx Priority Overnight Saturday Delivery


This was working in the FedEx app because **Priority Overnight** and **Priority Overnight Saturday Delivery** were available as two separate/individual services.

In MCSL, there is only one **FedEx Priority Overnight** service, where Saturday Delivery is added as a special service instead of being shown as a separate service.

**Requirement:**
Could you please check the feasibility of bringing FedEx Saturday Delivery services as individual services in MCSL, similar to how they are available in the FedEx app?

**Store Details:**
**Store URL:** **9f2ea1-08.myshopify.com**** **
**Account ID: 5e1aab9a-77f8-4ed8-9c94-43610f52ca28**


 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/8eXicNwn8rWN2T1m8Yfs2G6qM/?name=image.png)
 ![](https://pluginhive.zendesk.com/attachments/token/kX7uUJJpcyQtl7Q4aJX0cR8IQ/?name=image.png)

comments.body:
**FedEx Priority Overnight** and **Priority Overnight Saturday Delivery** are not 2 different services, **Priority Overnight Saturday Delivery ** is created by app to display **FedEx Priority Overnight** charges with additional Saturday delivery surcharge.  In FedEx app have provision to display a service with and without surcharge,

Its not a missing service case.
[Veena]
comments.html_body:
FedEx Priority Overnight and Priority Overnight Saturday Delivery are not 2 different services, Priority Overnight Saturday Delivery  is created by app to display FedEx Priority Overnight charges with additional Saturday delivery surcharge.  In FedEx app have provision to display a service with and without surcharge,
 
Its not a missing service case.
[Veena]

comments.body:
Hello Assi,

Thank you for your reply.

In the **PH Ship Rate & Track for FedEx** app, **FedEx Priority Overnight** and **FedEx Priority Overnight Saturday Delivery** are available as two separate services.

However, in the new **PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label** app, there is currently only one **FedEx Priority Overnight** service, and **FedEx Priority Overnight Saturday Delivery** is not available as a separate service.
When it is Thursday or Friday, the **FedEx Priority Overnight** service is displayed including the Saturday Delivery surcharge.

At the moment, the **FedEx 2Day** and **Priority Overnight** services are working as expected, and no changes are needed. However, **FedEx Priority Overnight Saturday Delivery** is currently being displayed with one rate and not without One Rate.

We will be enhancing the app to make **FedEx Priority Overnight** and **FedEx Priority Overnight Saturday Delivery** available as two separate services, similar to the FedEx app. This will allow the app to compare the rates with and without One Rate and display the cheapest available FedEx Priority Overnight Saturday Delivery service.

This enhancement is expected to be ready by the **2nd week of June**. Rest assured, we will keep you posted.

We appreciate your understanding.

Thanks and Regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive
comments.html_body:
Hello Assi,
 
Thank you for your reply.
 
In the PH Ship Rate & Track for FedEx app, FedEx Priority Overnight and FedEx Priority Overnight Saturday Delivery are available as two separate services.
 
However, in the new PH Multi Carrier Shipping Label app, there is currently only one FedEx Priority Overnight service, and FedEx Priority Overnight Saturday Delivery is not available as a separate service.
When it is Thursday or Friday, the FedEx Priority Overnight service is displayed including the Saturday Delivery surcharge.
 
At the moment, the FedEx 2Day and Priority Overnight services are working as expected, and no changes are needed. However, FedEx Priority Overnight Saturday Delivery is currently being displayed with one rate and not without One Rate.
 
We will be enhancing the app to make FedEx Priority Overnight and FedEx Priority Overnight Saturday Delivery available as two separate services, similar to the FedEx app. This will allow the app to compare the rates with and without One Rate and display the cheapest available FedEx Priority Overnight Saturday Delivery service.
 
This enhancement is expected to be ready by the 2nd week of June. Rest assured, we will keep you posted.
 
We appreciate your understanding.

Thanks and Regards,
Manohar V
Team PluginHive
